queries.question: Provide cocktail lounges and sports bars that are open from 5pm to 2am.
queries.sql:
SELECT cocktail_lounges.name
FROM cocktail_lounges
WHERE cocktail_lounges.hours = "Open from 5 PM to 2 AM"
UNION
SELECT sports_bars.name
FROM sports_bars
WHERE sports_bars.hours = "Open from 5 PM to 2 AM"
